payload.answer: SQL query execution denied. BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false prevents direct SQL access to memory_cards. Use standard Brain query interface instead.

entity_resolution.reason: Debug SQL mode is disabled; query execution not permitted

payload.intent: Execute SQL query on memory_cards table with debug SQL disabled

memory_cards.statement: BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false; direct SQL queries are disabled

details: SQL execution blocked by access control

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in authorized admin context
Use Brain query API instead of raw SQL
Request memory_cards data through standard retrieval interface
